name: Fantastic Focaccia Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Dip dough and a rolling pin in flour and evenly roll dough into a 12-inch circle. Use a 13-inch baking stone if possible.
3. Spread garlic evenly over the crust.
4. Take half of the Romano cheese, one cup of Mozzarella, and one teaspoon of oregano and sprinkle over the crust.
5. Slice the tomatoes thinly and layer across them.
6. Sprinkle remaining ingredients over the tomatoes.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes.
8. Cut and serve. Makes 8 slices.
